mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_screenings WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, screening_type_id AS screeningTypeId, last_completed_date AS lastCompletedDate, next_due_date AS nextDueDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM user_screenings WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_screenings (user_id, screening_type_id, last_completed_date, next_due_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{screeningTypeId}, #{lastCompletedDate}, #{nextDueDate}, NOW(), NOW())
